description:
A staging data-ingestion worker crashed in production. Using Visual Studio 2022, analyze the crash dump 'IngestionWorker.dmp' located at 'C:\Workspace\CrashAnalysis\' (alongside 'IngestionWorker.pdb' and 'PayloadProcessor.cs'). Identify the exact Exception type that caused the crash, the value of 'currentTransactionId', and the value of 'retryCount' at the moment of the crash within the 'PayloadProcessor.ProcessBatch' method. Save your findings to 'C:\Workspace\CrashAnalysis\investigation_result.txt' formatted as follows:

Exception: [ExactExceptionType]
TransactionId: [Integer]
RetryCount: [Integer]
